controls.control_objective: Replace long-lived cloud keys with GitHub Actions OIDC federation and short-lived token exchange.
controls.implementation: GitHub Actions OIDC federation validates access to Yandex Cloud without static cloud keys.
controls.portfolio_claim: OIDC-based CI/CD authentication was validated without long-lived cloud key material.

controls.control_objective: Use scoped service accounts for bootstrap, registry, audit, and short-lived Managed Kubernetes workloads.
controls.implementation: Bootstrap service accounts were retained separately from temporary MKS runtime service accounts; temporary MKS identities were destroyed after cloud evidence runs.
controls.portfolio_claim: Temporary runtime identities were separated from retained bootstrap identities and removed after validation.

controls.control_objective: Enable audit trail collection and preserve sanitized public evidence for cloud actions.
controls.implementation: Audit Trails resource was retained and validated as part of the bootstrap evidence track.
controls.portfolio_claim: Cloud audit evidence was integrated into the evidence register and gap register.

controls.control_objective: Provision and destroy cloud infrastructure through controlled Terraform runs.
controls.implementation: Managed Kubernetes, network, service accounts, node group, and cleanup paths were executed with Terraform and verified after destroy.
controls.portfolio_claim: Cloud resources were created and destroyed through IaC with post-destroy verification.

controls.control_objective: Demonstrate real Managed Kubernetes lifecycle evidence in Yandex Cloud.
controls.implementation: Short-lived MKS clusters were created for baseline/remediation and Kyverno validation, then destroyed.
controls.portfolio_claim: Managed Kubernetes was validated using real cloud infrastructure, not only local manifests.

controls.control_objective: Move from insecure workload patterns to hardened runtime controls.
controls.implementation: Hardened workload requirements include non-root execution, privilege escalation denial, read-only root filesystem, dropped capabilities, RuntimeDefault seccomp, and registry-controlled image source.
controls.portfolio_claim: Hardened workload controls were validated through server-side admission.

controls.control_objective: Enforce workload security requirements at admission time.
controls.implementation: Kyverno admission policy denied the insecure workload and allowed the hardened workload.
controls.portfolio_claim: Kyverno admission policy enforcement was proven on Yandex Managed Kubernetes.

controls.control_objective: Build and push container images through OIDC-authenticated CI/CD into Yandex Container Registry.
controls.implementation: GitHub Actions exchanged an OIDC assertion for a Yandex Cloud IAM token and pushed controlled demo images to YCR.
controls.portfolio_claim: CI/CD image publishing was validated through OIDC and Yandex Container Registry.

controls.control_objective: Generate SBOM evidence for insecure and hardened container images.
controls.implementation: Syft generated CycloneDX SBOMs for registry-pushed insecure and hardened images.
controls.portfolio_claim: SBOM evidence exists for both vulnerable baseline and hardened image.

controls.control_objective: Measure vulnerability reduction between insecure and hardened images.
controls.implementation: Trivy and Grype scans were executed against registry-pushed images, and final remediation metrics were consolidated.
controls.portfolio_claim: The hardened image showed measurable vulnerability reduction compared with the insecure baseline.

controls.control_objective: Keep public evidence sanitized and prevent accidental publication of secrets, kubeconfigs, or Terraform state.
controls.implementation: Evidence files were sanitized and repository safety checks used gitleaks plus explicit artifact guards.
controls.portfolio_claim: Evidence publication controls were implemented and validated before commits.

controls.control_objective: Avoid uncontrolled paid cloud resource retention after validation runs.
controls.implementation: Temporary MKS resources were destroyed after evidence collection; bootstrap resources remain intentionally retained until final cleanup decision.
controls.portfolio_claim: Temporary paid MKS resources were removed and verified after the cloud evidence run.

controls.control_objective: Keep public claims aligned with validated evidence and avoid overstating unproven capabilities.
controls.implementation: Cloud evidence gap register, evidence index, and final remediation metrics constrain the final portfolio narrative.
controls.portfolio_claim: Validated claims are tied to committed evidence paths.
